response.justification: The candidate is a highly experienced full-stack and web developer but falls significantly short of the core requirements for this role. They lack the mandatory 5–10 years of hands-on C++ development on Windows, having only a brief 7-month stint using C/C++ back in 2014-2015. Furthermore, there is no evidence of the required domain expertise in capital markets, fixed income, or investment banking, and their database experience does not highlight SQL Server or Oracle.
strengths: Extensive 18+ years of software engineering experience across various modern tech stacks.
Strong background in CI/CD pipelines, scripting languages, and Java development.
Demonstrated leadership and software craftsmanship through mentoring, workshops, and open-source contributions.
concerns: Lacks the mandatory 5-10 years of hands-on C++ development on the Windows platform.
No demonstrated experience in Capital Markets, Investment Banking, or Fixed Income domains.
Missing the required robust SQL experience specifically with SQL Server or Oracle.
